L1.head: designing metasurface with asymmetric gold nanoantennas
L1.tail: excitation and confinement of terahertz SPPs
L1.claim: 纳米天线设计使得表面等离极化激元(SPPs)的激发与限制成为可能

L1.head: excitation and confinement of terahertz SPPs
L1.claim: SPPs的场增强效应促进非线性四波混频过程

L1.head: degenerate four-wave mixing process
L1.claim: 非线性光学过程产生亚衍射极限虚拟点源

L1.head: virtual point source
L1.claim: 虚拟点源实现消色差超分辨成像

L2.head: metasurface's geometric phase control
L2.claim: 几何相位调控确保定向发射特性

L2.head: directional emission
L2.claim: 定向发射实现突破衍射极限的聚焦

L2.head: nonlinear process
L2.claim: 非线性机制消除波长依赖性焦点偏移

L2.head: avoidance of focal shifts
L2.claim: 消除焦点偏移允许宽带太赫兹聚焦

L3.head: material-dependent nonlinear response
L3.claim: 材料非线性响应导致固有消色差特性

L3.head: inherent achromatic properties
L3.claim: 消色差特性突破色差限制

L3.head: multiple frequency SPPs confinement
L3.claim: 多频SPPs限制产生宽带太赫兹辐射

L3.head: broadband terahertz radiation
L3.claim: 宽带辐射覆盖0.5-5 THz工作频段
